sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Updates a warranty claim with agent decision and recommendation. Agent asks for approval in instructions before calling. IMPORTANT: agent_decision must be exact lowercase: approve, deny, or escalate.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"number","value":"","description":"Claim number (WC-format) to identify the record","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"agent_decision","value":"","description":"Decision value - MUST be exact lowercase: approve, deny, or escalate","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"agent_recommendation","value":"","description":"Complete multi-paragraph reasoning with KB citations embedded","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"api_call_timestamp","value":"","description":"Current timestamp when decision was made (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format)","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"crudInputs","value":{"operation":"update","table":{"value":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim","displayValue":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim"},"query":"number={{number}}","fieldValues":[{"field":{"id":"agent_decision","sublabel":"agent_decision","excludedOperators":[],"label":"agent_decision","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"agent_decision"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{agent_decision}}"}},{"field":{"id":"agent_recommendation","sublabel":"agent_recommendation","excludedOperators":[],"label":"agent_recommendation","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"agent_recommendation"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{agent_recommendation}}"}},{"field":{"id":"api_call_timestamp","sublabel":"api_call_timestamp","excludedOperators":[],"label":"api_call_timestamp","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"api_call_timestamp"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{api_call_timestamp}}"}}],"returnFields":[{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"sys_id","label":"sys_id","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"sys_id","sublabel":"sys_id"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"number","label":"number","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"number","sublabel":"number"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"state","label":"state","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"state","sublabel":"state"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"agent_decision","label":"agent_decision","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"agent_decision","sublabel":"agent_decision"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"agent_recommendation","label":"agent_recommendation","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"agent_recommendation","sublabel":"agent_recommendation"}],"limit":"1"},"description":"Update operation configuration","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Update Warranty Claim
